codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly addresses all four objectives from the feature description: (1) fixes act() warnings in MonthEndChecklistPage tests via waitFor, (2) replaces 4 fixture-math-only O2C consistency checks with UI-rendered assertions, (3) adds exhaustive tab coverage for SettlementsPage (Hybrid Receipt and Dealer Settlement tabs), and (4) aligns idempotency key generation to use uuidv4() consistently across GoodsReceiptNotesPage and InventoryAdjustmentsPage. All changes are well-scoped, maintain contract behavior, and include appropriate test coverage. The handoff confirms all 112 targeted tests pass with zero lint/typecheck errors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The idempotency-key pattern is now consistently using uuidv4() across the codebase (api.ts, JournalsPage, SettlementsPage, GoodsReceiptNotesPage, InventoryAdjustmentsPage, PackingPage, CreateOrderDrawer), but this convention is not documented in AGENTS.md or the library files. Future workers implementing new mutation flows may not know to use uuidv4() for idempotency keys.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Grep shows uuidv4 used for idempotencyKey in multiple files: api.ts:135, JournalsPage.tsx:193, SettlementsPage.tsx (lines 163, 309, 482, 638, 770, 888, 1003, 1121, 1232, 1348), GoodsReceiptNotesPage.tsx:58, InventoryAdjustmentsPage.tsx:64, PackingPage.tsx:194/475. The generateIdempotencyKey() helper in inventoryApi.ts (line 294) also uses uuidv4 pattern. This could be documented as a project-wide convention.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-workflow-worker skill emphasizes manual browser verification with agent-browser and capturing evidence, but this feature completed successfully with only unit test verification (no browser validation performed). The handoff confirms followedProcedure: true, which suggests the skill may be too prescriptive for polish/followup features that don't change visible workflow behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true but no interactiveChecks recorded. The feature description explicitly states 'without changing the validated contract behavior' which justifies skipping browser re-validation, but the skill procedure doesn't account for this exception case.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Test patterns for handling async state updates with waitFor to avoid act() warnings are now established in MonthEndChecklistPage.test.tsx, but this pattern is not documented as a testing guideline in AGENTS.md or the library files.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: MonthEndChecklistPage.test.tsx line 72-77: The 'renders page heading' test now includes a waitFor block to let async getPeriods/getChecklist settle with an explanatory comment about why this is needed. This pattern could be documented for other tests that render components with async state updates.

summary: PASS: The implementation correctly addresses all scrutiny followups from the accounting workflow milestone. The four changes are (1) waitFor-based act() warning fix in MonthEndChecklistPage tests, (2) UI-rendered O2C consistency checks replacing fixture math, (3) exhaustive SettlementsPage tab coverage, and (4) uuidv4() idempotency key alignment. No blocking issues found. Minor shared-state observations noted for idempotency-key conventions documentation, skill flexibility for non-behavior-changing polish work, and async test pattern documentation.
